title: helichrysum jubilatum
intro: Helichrysum jubilatum, also known as the yellow mountain crown, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum jubilatum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, improving circulation, and supporting immune function. Helichrysum jubilatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
